name: WP-W2-proxy-authority: apply the central proxy authority guard to remaining unguarded routes
description: W2 (identity/consent/proxy/age) — apply the central guardian-act-for authority check (MMT-ADR-0008, inv 7/8) at each remaining unguarded proxy mutation site (library-filing, unmetered route), on the W1 authority model. Subsumes by construction F-117/F-144 (patched in WI-549 / WP-W0-patch-api) — do not re-implement the W0 patches.
acceptanceCriteria: Every proxy mutation passes the central authority check; regression AC — the WP-W0-patch-api (WI-549) break-tests for F-117/F-144 still pass against the rebuilt model; do not re-implement the W0 patches. Findings: F-126 (library-filing proxy guard), F-023 (unmetered-route proxy-guard skip). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W2-proxy-authority (commit 23d0c01ad)
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W2-proxy-authority)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 → "WP-W2-proxy-authority" detail block @ commit 23d0c01ad (eduagent-build) — the frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001).
Bundle rationale
The same proxy-write-authority guard applied across the remaining unguarded routes (library-filing, unmetered route), on the W1 authority model.
Strategy
Central guardian-act-for authority check (MMT-ADR-0008, inv 7/8) at each proxy mutation site.
Scope
In: F-126 (library-filing proxy guard), F-023 (unmetered-route proxy-guard skip). Out: the W0-patched proxy defects (subsumed — see below).
Findings table
Subsumes by construction: F-117, F-144 (patched in WP-W0-patch-api / WI-549).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
Every proxy mutation passes the central authority check.
Regression AC: the WI-549 break-tests for F-117/F-144 still pass against the rebuilt model — do NOT re-implement the W0 patches.
Risk & blast radius
S / standard — proxy mutation paths. Depends on WP-W1-authority-graph (WI-572) + WP-W2-scope-rls (WI-574).
